mapper.sql: pt.id AS prompt_template_id, pt.prompt_type, pt.version_number, pt.content, pt.content_hash, pt.change_note, pt.created_by_user_id, COALESCE(creator.display_name, 'SYSTEM') AS created_by_name, pt.created_at, CASE WHEN current_activation.prompt_template_id = pt.id THEN 'ACTIVE' WHEN activation_summary.last_activated_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'ARCHIVED' ELSE 'DRAFT' END AS status, activation_summary.last_activated_at

LEFT JOIN app_users creator ON creator.id = pt.created_by_user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (active_template.prompt_type) active_template.prompt_type, pa.prompt_template_id FROM prompt_activations pa JOIN prompt_templates active_template ON active_template.id = pa.prompt_template_id ORDER BY active_template.prompt_type, pa.id DESC ) current_activation ON current_activation.prompt_type = pt.prompt_type LEFT JOIN ( SELECT prompt_template_id, MAX(activated_at) AS last_activated_at FROM prompt_activations GROUP BY prompt_template_id ) activation_summary ON activation_summary.prompt_template_id = pt.id
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prompt_templates WHERE prompt_type = #{promptType}

SELECT FROM prompt_templates pt
WHERE pt.prompt_type = #{promptType} AND current_activation.prompt_template_id = pt.id

SELECT pa.id AS activation_id, pa.prompt_template_id, pt.version_number, pa.activated_by_user_id, COALESCE(actor.display_name, 'SYSTEM') AS activated_by_name, pa.activated_at FROM prompt_activations pa JOIN prompt_templates pt ON pt.id = pa.prompt_template_id LEFT JOIN app_users actor ON actor.id = pa.activated_by_user_id WHERE pt.prompt_type = #{promptType} ORDER BY pa.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
